title: geofencing — subprocessors
description: No third-party subprocessors. All geometry math runs locally against Postgres/PostGIS + in-process PolygonEvaluator. Location coordinates never leave our infrastructure.
notes: The geometry math libraries (clickbar/laravel-magellan, spinen/laravel-geometry) are Composer dependencies that run entirely in-process. No network traffic.
PostGIS is a Postgres extension — same trust boundary as the primary DB.

This module INTENTIONALLY does not integrate with reverse-geocoding services (Google Maps, HERE, Mapbox) at the geometry layer. Precise coordinates are never sent to third parties. If a tenant enables the address normalisation feature via the future `geography` integration, ONLY country / city / postal_code are sent — no precise coords.
